# Peroot (פירוט) - Hebrew Prompt Engineering Tool

> Peroot is an AI-powered prompt generator built specifically for Hebrew. It transforms raw ideas into structured, professional-grade prompts optimized for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and other LLMs.

## Key URLs
- [Homepage](https://peroot.space/): Main app - prompt enhancement tool
- [Pricing](https://peroot.space/pricing): Free and Pro plan details
- [Blog](https://peroot.space/blog): Guides and tutorials on prompt engineering
- [Privacy Policy](https://peroot.space/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://peroot.space/terms)
- [Contact](https://peroot.space/contact)

## Blog Articles
- [10 Common Mistakes in Writing Prompts](https://peroot.space/blog/10-common-prompt-mistakes): Common errors and how to fix them
- [How to Write a Good Prompt - Complete Guide](https://peroot.space/blog/how-to-write-good-prompt): Step-by-step guide for effective prompts
- [Prompt Engineering for Marketers](https://peroot.space/blog/prompt-engineering-for-marketers): Marketing-focused prompt techniques
- [Creating Content in Hebrew with AI](https://peroot.space/blog/creating-content-in-hebrew-with-ai): Guide for Hebrew AI content creation
- [Image Creation Prompts Guide](https://peroot.space/blog/image-creation-prompts-guide): DALL-E, Midjourney, and Stable Diffusion prompts
- [ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini Comparison](https://peroot.space/blog/chatgpt-vs-claude-vs-gemini): Full AI model comparison

## Product Features
- Hebrew-first prompt improver (RTL-native, not translated)
- 4 capability modes: Standard text, Deep research, Image prompts, Agent builder
- "Great Prompt" structured output with context, goal, constraints, and format
- Clarifying questions (0-3) to refine intent
- Real-time prompt strength scoring
- 410+ prompt templates in public library
- Personal prompt library with favorites and organization
- Smart variables with {placeholder} syntax
- Iterative refinement with Refine and Quick Actions

## Key Facts
- Built by JoyaTech (https://joya-tech.net)
- Creator: Gal Sasson
- Language: Hebrew (primary), with English support
- Free tier available with daily credits
- Pro plan for unlimited usage

## Contact
- Email: gal@joya-tech.net
- Website: https://joya-tech.net
